metadata.title: NIST SP 800-171 Rev2 -> 800-53 Rev4 control mapping (Appendix D, Table D-1)
metadata.remarks: From 800-171 Rev2 Appendix D Table D-1 (a 171 requirement is a tailored subset of the relevant 800-53 control). 102 requirements mapped; 1 explicit no-800-53-mapping (['3.12.4']); RESIDUE pending verification: ['3.10.4', '3.10.5', '3.12.3', '3.14.2', '3.14.5', '3.2.2', '3.4.2'].

provenance.mapping-description: NIST's authoritative 171->53 tailoring mapping (Table D-1); 171 requirements are tailored subsets of the 800-53 controls.
